cards.name: 4 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: possessiveness, insecurity, hoarding, stinginess, stability, security, savings, materialism, wealth, frugality, boundaries, guardedness

cards.name: 10 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: family disputes, bankruptcy, debt, fleeting success, conflict over money, instability, breaking traditions

cards.name: Knight of Wands
cards.interpretation: courageous, energetic, charming, hero, rebellious, hot tempered, free spirit
